sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64114" key="lukoskuta/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῠκο-σκῠτάλιον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n64114.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σησαμοειδὲς τὸ μέγα</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.149</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
